name: Espresso Romano
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill the filter section of a steamed-pressure coffeepot with cold water.
2. Place the filter in the base and screw on the top portion of the coffeepot.
3. Heat over medium heat until the coffee begins to bubble into the top portion.
4. Reduce the heat to low and simmer until bubbling stops.
5. Serve immediately. Garnish with lemon peel.
From Sheila Buff & Judi Olstein, "The New Mixer's Guide to Low-Alcohol and Nonalcoholic Drinks." Published by HPBooks, Inc., 1986, ISBN 0-89586-458-4.
